title: lolium italicum
intro: Lolium italicum, also known as Italian ryegrass, is a species of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is valued for its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Lolium italicum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes, and its ability to support immune function. Lolium italicum is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
